name: close-user-tickets
description: Move every open Jira ticket assigned to a user to a target status. Uses the `sdkck jira` plugin: searches with JQL, then for each ticket looks up its available transitions and applies the one whose name matches --var transition (default "Done"; many workflows call it "Closed"). Authenticate once with `sdkck jira auth add`.

steps.log: Searching for open tickets assigned to ${assignee} in ${project}...

steps.exec: sdkck jira issue search "project = ${project} AND assignee = ${assignee} AND statusCategory != Done" --max 100 2>/dev/null
